title: Crops+
description: Crops+ is a texture pack to see when your crops are ready.
body:
Crops+ is a texture pack to see when your crops are ready.
With Crops+, a rectangle appears above the crops to show if they are ready. When the rectangle turns red they are just planted, when it turns orange they are a little further along and halfway through growth, when the rectangle turns yellow the crops are almost ready and when the rectangle turns green they are done!
Stages                                      
RedOrangeYellowGreen
Just plantedHalfwayAlmost doneReady to eat!
My Website: [https://www.wedofun.nl/](https://www.wedofun.nl/)
More Minecraft Mods: [https://www.wedofun.nl/downloads/mc](https://www.wedofun.nl/downloads/mc)
(It's Dutch so you may need to translate the site)
